review.rootCause: SPLIT-BRAIN RESTRICTION MASTERS. The system has THREE parallel restriction models and the apps read different ones. (1) bridge.management.Restrictions (db/schema.cds:162, hierarchical) is what the Restrictions app maintains (app/restrictions/webapp/manifest.json -> /odata/v4/admin, contextPath /Restrictions = AdminService.Restrictions); it is also what the operational Dashboard KPIs (srv/handlers/dashboard.js), massUploadRestrictions (srv/handlers/upload.js:259), the mass-upload xlsx Restrictions sheet (srv/mass-upload.js importRestrictionRows), mass-edit (srv/server.js loadMassEditRestrictions), map/CSV export, and postingStatus derivation (srv/handlers/common.js:39) use. (2) bridge.management.BridgeRestrictions (db/schema.cds:204) is a SEPARATE table maintained only from the Bridges register object page (admin-bridges app, AdminService.BridgeRestrictions) and is the ONLY source of the Restrictions Dashboard ALP / Network Restrictions report (AdminService.NetworkRestrictionReport, srv/admin-service.cds:342) and of prioritisation restrictionFlag (srv/prioritisation-service.js:72). Nothing syncs the two, so the set of bridges shown with restrictions in the Restrictions app necessarily differs from the Bridges register and from the dashboard. (3) nhvr.Restriction/nhvr.Bridge (db/schema/restrictions.cds, db/schema/core.cds) is a stale third model compiled into the DB but exposed by no service — it ironically holds the richest NHVR attribute set (gazette number/dates, PBS class, axle-group limits, review date, flood/seasonal triggers, pilot vehicles). Aggravating factors: AdminService.before('READ', Bridges) (srv/admin-service.js ~line 966) silently injects status='Active' into every collection read, so the Restrictions app bridge value help (Common.ValueList CollectionPath 'Bridges' on bridgeRef, app/restrictions/fiori-service.cds:244) can never show Inactive bridges that the register shows via its status filter; the link is a free-string bridgeRef resolved to bridge_ID in a before-CREATE handler (srv/admin-service.js:1156), and BridgeRestrictions has lanes/severity/transportMode fields that Restrictions lacks entirely. Also Bridges.restriction is a stale SINGULAR association (db/schema.cds:125) still wired into app/restrictions/value-help.cds. Finally, postingStatus 'CLOSED' is derived from restrictionType==='CLOSURE' (srv/handlers/common.js:43) — a code that does not exist in the seeded RestrictionTypes, so closure can never be derived.
missingTypes: Seeded set is only 4 codes (srv/mass-upload.js:1549 FALLBACK_LOOKUP_DATA + xlsx RestrictionTypes sheet): Access Restriction, Dimension Limit, Mass Limit, Speed Restriction — and there is NO db/data CSV for RestrictionTypes/RestrictionStatuses/RestrictionCategories/RestrictionUnits/RestrictionDirections/VehicleClasses at all, so a fresh deploy has EMPTY mandatory dropdowns
Load Limit (posted/sign-posted load limit, NSW RMS posted-load) — distinct from generic Mass Limit
Axle Mass / Axle-Group Limit (single / tandem / tri-axle group) as its own type
Height (vertical clearance) limit — only generic 'Dimension Limit' exists; Width limit; Length limit as separate codes
Lane Restriction / Lane Width / Single-Lane Operation (laneAvailability codes exist in LaneAvailabilityTypes CSV but no corresponding restriction type)
Vehicle Class / PBS-Level Restriction (B-double, road train, HML, PBS L1-L4 network access)
Bridge Closure / Full Closure and Temporary/Event Closure (required by srv/handlers/common.js:43 'CLOSURE' logic that can never fire today)
One-Way / Directional Restriction (RestrictionDirections also lacks a 'One-way' code)

Environmental / Conditional restriction (flood-level trigger, fire, wind, seasonal) — nhvr.Restriction has triggerType/floodLevelTriggerMahd/seasonalStartMonth but the live bms model has no type or fields
Speed Restriction exists but no escort/permit-condition type (permit-required travel condition)
RestrictionUnits gaps: no axle-group unit, no 'lanes', no 'vehicles/class', nothing for closures
missingAttributes: restrictionValue is free-text String(60) — no typed numeric limit value with unit validation (per-type value+unit enforcement absent in both Restrictions and BridgeRestrictions)

Gazette: only legalReference String(111) free text — missing gazetteNumber, gazettePublicationDate, gazetteExpiryDate, gazetteRenewalRef (all present in stale nhvr.Restriction, db/schema/restrictions.cds:50-53)
reviewDueDate (next review of the restriction) — missing in bms model; nhvr.Restriction has it
approvalDate — approvedBy exists but no date; nhvr.Restriction has approvalDate
restriction reason/cause (engineering cause, linked defect/inspection) — only temporaryReason exists
Vehicle classes: single appliesToVehicleClass String(40) — no multi-class applicability and no pbsClassApplicable (nhvr.Restriction has pbsClassApplicable)
Axle-group detail: only axleMassLimit — no tandemAxleLimit, triAxleLimit, steerAxleLimit (these exist on BridgeCapacities and nhvr.Restriction but not on restrictions)
pilotVehicleCount / escort detail missing (only escortRequired boolean); signageRequired missing (nhvr has it)

bms.Restrictions (the Restrictions app entity) lacks ALL the Phase-1 multimodal fields that BridgeRestrictions has: transportMode, network, laneAvailability, lanesOpen, lanesTotal, laneWidthLimit, restrictionSeverity — so severity and lane data cannot be captured in the Restrictions app at all

direction default mismatch: srv/handlers/restrictions.js:20 defaults 'Both', schema default 'Both' (db/schema.cds:187), but the RestrictionDirections codelist only contains 'Both Directions' — saved values fall outside the codelist
BridgeRestrictions lacks dayOfWeek/time-window applicability and nhvrPermitClass that nhvr.Restriction carries
review.uploadGaps: MASS UPLOAD: (1) Both upload paths write ONLY bridge.management.Restrictions — there is no dataset/path for BridgeRestrictions, so the Restrictions Dashboard ALP and prioritisation can never be populated by upload. (2) massUploadRestrictions (srv/handlers/upload.js:184-275) silently drops approvedBy, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, issuingAuthority is kept but temporaryFrom/temporaryTo/temporaryReason, name, descr, parent_ID are missing from the column map; it never generates restrictionRef (RST-NNNN) so uploaded rows have null refs; it performs no codelist validation of restrictionType/restrictionUnit/restrictionCategory/direction; it never calls updateBridgePostingStatus; and it writes no ChangeLog entries (violates locked rule 3). (3) The xlsx importer (srv/mass-upload.js importRestrictionRows:1035) has the full column set but also validates no codes against the lookup sheets, and the workbook lookup sheets omit LaneAvailabilityTypes and RestrictionSeverities entirely (they exist only as db/data CSVs). (4) No db/data CSV seeds exist for the six restriction codelists, so seeding depends entirely on someone importing the xlsx lookups. MASS EDIT: srv/server.js MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_COLUMNS (line 67) exposes a reduced field set — missing issuingAuthority, legalReference, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, temporaryFrom/To/Reason, descr, and bridge re-link (bridge_ID/bridgeRef not editable); there is no BridgeRestrictions mass-edit at all; the OData massEditBridges action (srv/services/mass-edit.cds) covers bridges only; restriction dropdown lookups exclude severity/lane availability because those fields don't exist on Restrictions.
review.reportGaps: REPORTS: (1) NetworkRestrictionReport (srv/admin-service.cds:342, backing both the 'Network Restrictions' list and the 'Restrictions Dashboard' ALP tile, srv/launchpad.js:105) selects ONLY from BridgeRestrictions — every restriction maintained in the Restrictions app is invisible to it; conversely getNetworkKPIs/getRestrictionSummary (srv/handlers/dashboard.js:7-41) count ONLY bridge.management.Restrictions — so the two 'dashboards' disagree by construction. (2) ActiveRestrictions view (srv/services/restrictions.cds:26) filters restrictionStatus='Active' and active=true but ignores effectiveTo/temporaryTo — expired restrictions still report as active. (3) CSV/GeoJSON export RESTRICTION_EXPORT_FIELDS (srv/lib/csv-export.js:30) omits issuingAuthority, legalReference, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, temporary fields, remarks, and all severity/lane/transport-mode columns. (4) Prioritisation restrictionFlag (srv/prioritisation-service.js:72,129) reads BridgeRestrictions only, so restrictions entered via the Restrictions app/mass upload never influence prioritisation. (5) No gazette-expiry or review-due report exists anywhere despite NSW gazettal workflow. (6) massDownloadBridges exists but there is no massDownloadRestrictions OData action — restriction extract only via the map-layer endpoint.

fixPlan.step: 1. UNIFY THE MASTER (root-cause fix, additive per locked rule 1): extend bridge.management.Restrictions with the BridgeRestrictions-only fields (transportMode, network, laneAvailability, lanesOpen, lanesTotal, laneWidthLimit, restrictionSeverity, eamNotificationId/eamSyncStatus/eamLastSyncAt). Write a one-off idempotent migration script that copies BridgeRestrictions rows into Restrictions (keyed by restrictionRef, preserving IDs in a sourceRecordId-style column), then redefine AdminService.BridgeRestrictions and NetworkRestrictionReport as projections on the unified Restrictions entity so the Bridges object-page tab, the Restrictions app, the ALP and prioritisation all read/write one table. Keep the old BridgeRestrictions table deprecated-not-deleted.
fixPlan.files: db/schema.cds (entity Restrictions ~line 162); srv/admin-service.cds (BridgeRestrictions projection line 45, NetworkRestrictionReport line 342); srv/prioritisation-service.js (lines 72,129); scripts/migrate-bridgerestrictions.js (new); srv/admin-service.js (BridgeRestrictions lifecycle handlers ~1067-1126)

fixPlan.step: 2. SEED THE FULL NSW/NHVR CODELISTS AS CSVs so fresh deploys are never empty and the type set is complete: add db/data CSVs for RestrictionTypes (add Load Limit, Gross Combination Mass, Axle Group Limit, Height Limit, Width Limit, Length Limit, Lane Restriction, Vehicle Class/PBS Restriction, One-Way/Directional, Temporary Closure, Full Closure [code CLOSURE], Environmental/Flood, Speed, Access), RestrictionStatuses, RestrictionCategories, RestrictionUnits (+axle-group, lanes), RestrictionDirections (+One-way), VehicleClasses (+Road Train, HML, PBS L1-L4); mirror the same lists in FALLBACK_LOOKUP_DATA and regenerate BMS-MassUpload-Complete.xlsx (also add LaneAvailabilityTypes and RestrictionSeverities lookup sheets).
fixPlan.files: db/data/bridge.management-RestrictionTypes.csv (new) + 5 sibling CSVs (new); srv/mass-upload.js (FALLBACK_LOOKUP_DATA line 1483, DATASETS line 150, REFERENCE_EXAMPLES line 222); db/data/BMS-MassUpload-Complete.xlsx (regenerate)

fixPlan.step: 3. FIX THE CLOSED-STATUS DERIVATION AND DIRECTION DEFAULT: change updateBridgePostingStatus to recognise the seeded closure code(s) (restrictionType in ['Full Closure','CLOSURE'] or a new isClosure flag on RestrictionTypes) and align the direction default to the codelist value 'Both Directions' in both the schema default and the BridgeManagementService handler.

4. ADD MISSING ATTRIBUTES (additive) to the unified Restrictions entity, porting them from the stale nhvr.Restriction model: gazetteNumber, gazettePublicationDate, gazetteExpiryDate, reviewDueDate, approvalDate, detourRoute (String), restrictionReason (String/assoc to BridgeDefects), pbsClassApplicable, grossCombinationLimit, tandemAxleLimit, triAxleLimit, steerAxleLimit, pilotVehicleCount, signageRequired, dayOfWeek/time-window; surface them in the Restrictions app object page (new 'Gazette & Review' and 'Axle/Combination Limits' field groups) and the admin-bridges BridgeRestrictions facets, with value helps. Then deprecate db/schema/restrictions.cds + core.cds nhvr model (mark @deprecated, exclude from new work).
fixPlan.files: db/schema.cds; app/restrictions/fiori-service.cds (Facets/FieldGroups lines 80-238); app/admin-bridges/fiori-service.cds (BridgeRestrictions annotations lines 557-700); db/schema/restrictions.cds (deprecation comment)

fixPlan.step: 5. FIX THE BRIDGE LIST/VALUE-HELP MISMATCH: keep the Active-only default on AdminService.Bridges reads but exempt value-help/$search requests OR add an explicit status filter parameter to the bridgeRef value list so the Restrictions app can find any register bridge; replace the free-string bridgeRef VH with the association-based VH pattern already used by BridgeRestrictions (ValueListParameterOut on bridge_ID with bridgeId/state/transportMode display columns); remove the stale singular Bridges.restriction association usage from value-help.cds.
fixPlan.files: srv/admin-service.js (before-READ Bridges injector ~line 966; bridgeRef resolution line 1156); app/restrictions/fiori-service.cds (bridgeRef value list lines 242-254); app/restrictions/value-help.cds; db/schema.cds (deprecate restriction assoc line 125)

fixPlan.step: 6. COMPLETE MASS UPLOAD: extend the massUploadRestrictions column map to the full entity (approvedBy, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, temporaryFrom/To/Reason, descr, parent_ID, new gazette/severity/lane fields), auto-generate restrictionRef (RST-NNNN) like the AdminService NEW handler, validate restrictionType/unit/category/direction/vehicleClass against the codelist tables with row-level errors, call updateBridgePostingStatus per affected bridge, and queue ChangeLog audits (rule 3). Add the same codelist validation + new columns to importRestrictionRows and add a 'massDownloadRestrictions' action for round-trip edit.
fixPlan.files: srv/handlers/upload.js (lines 184-275); srv/mass-upload.js (RESTRICTION_COLUMNS line 75, importRestrictionRows line 1035); srv/services/upload.cds; srv/lib/csv-export.js

fixPlan.step: 7. COMPLETE MASS EDIT: add the missing editable columns (issuingAuthority, legalReference, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, temporaryFrom/To/Reason, descr, severity, laneAvailability, transportMode, new gazette/review fields) to MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_COLUMNS + MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_FIELD_TYPES with lookup-backed dropdowns (add RestrictionSeverities + LaneAvailabilityTypes to MASS_EDIT_DROPDOWN_DATASETS), keep audit via diffRecords, and recompute posting status after save.
fixPlan.files: srv/server.js (MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_COLUMNS line 67, MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_FIELD_TYPES line 184, MASS_EDIT_DROPDOWN_DATASETS line 274, saveMassEditRestrictions line 776); app/mass-edit/webapp/controller/MassEdit.controller.js

fixPlan.step: 8. FIX REPORTS: re-base NetworkRestrictionReport on the unified entity (after step 1 this is automatic); add effective/temporary expiry logic to ActiveRestrictions (where effectiveTo is null or >= $now); extend RESTRICTION_EXPORT_FIELDS with issuingAuthority, legalReference, approvalReference, enforcementAuthority, severity, lane and gazette columns; make dashboard getNetworkKPIs/getRestrictionSummary read the same unified source; add a Gazette-Expiry / Review-Due ALV report (restrictions with gazetteExpiryDate or reviewDueDate within N days) exposed as a new AdminService projection + tile.
fixPlan.files: srv/admin-service.cds (NetworkRestrictionReport line 342 + new RestrictionReviewReport); srv/services/restrictions.cds (ActiveRestrictions line 26); srv/handlers/dashboard.js; srv/lib/csv-export.js (line 30); srv/launchpad.js + app/appconfig/fioriSandboxConfig.json (new tile)

fixPlan.step: 9. VERIFY: cds build + npm test (Node 20); add unit tests for the closure derivation, codelist validation in both upload paths, the migration script idempotency, and an integration test asserting the Restrictions app, Bridges register tab, ALP and dashboard KPIs all return the same restriction count for a seeded bridge.
fixPlan.files: test/ (new specs); .github/workflows/ci.yml (no change, must stay green)

changes: srv/lib/restriction-codelists.js (new): canonical NSW/NHVR restriction catalogue — full type set (Load Limit, Gross Combination Mass, Axle Group Limit, Height/Width/Length Limit, Lane Restriction, Vehicle Class/PBS Restriction, One-Way Operation, Temporary/Full Closure, Environmental Restriction, Permit Condition + the 4 legacy codes kept verbatim), per-type unit rules, typed-value mapping, closure derivation (derivePostingStatus, recognises seeded closure types + legacy 'CLOSURE'), runtime insert-if-missing seeding with ChangeLog (NEVER CSV — the six codelist tables are already populated and hdbtabledata truncates), upload code validation (blocking type/category/status vs soft unit/direction/vehicle-class) and bulk posting-status refresh

db/schema.cds: additive RestrictionNhvrAttributes aspect (gazetteNumber/PublicationDate/ExpiryDate, reviewDueDate, approvalDate, restrictionReason, detourRoute, conditionTrigger, pbsClassApplicable, grossCombinationLimit, tandem/tri/steerAxleLimit, pilotVehicleCount, signageRequired) extended onto BOTH Restrictions and BridgeRestrictions; lane/severity parity fields (laneAvailability, lanesOpen/Total, laneWidthLimit, restrictionSeverity) added to Restrictions; direction default aligned to the codelist ('Both Directions'); stale singular Bridges.restriction association marked deprecated (kept — additive rule)

srv/admin-service.cds: new read-only AdminService.BridgeValueHelp projection on the SAME bridge.management.Bridges table as the register, exempt from the Active-only collection-read injector, searchable on bridgeId/bridgeName/state — the Restrictions app can now link any register bridge incl. Inactive ones; NetworkRestrictionReport (Restrictions Dashboard ALP) extended with vehicle class, direction, speed/length/axle/GCM limits, permit/escort, gazette number+expiry, review-due, reason, detour columns

app/restrictions/fiori-service.cds: bridgeRef value list rewired to BridgeValueHelp with bridgeName/state/transportMode/status display columns; new 'Axle & Combination Limits', 'Lane Configuration' and 'Gazette & Review' field groups; severity/lane/PBS fixed-value helps; severity + gazette-expiry + review-due list-report columns; numeric range guards for all new limit fields

app/admin-bridges/fiori-service.cds: BridgeRestrictions object-page tab gains the same gazette/review group, axle-group + GCM mass limits, PBS class, pilot-vehicle/signage, reason/detour/trigger fields

srv/handlers/common.js + srv/handlers/restrictions.js + srv/admin-service.js: postingStatus CLOSED now derives via the catalogue (previously keyed on a 'CLOSURE' literal that never existed in any seed, so closure could never fire); direction default fixed; per-type unit validation + typed-value auto-fill now covers the full catalogue and also runs on the Restrictions app entity (was BridgeRestrictions-only); numeric validation extended to the new limit/lane/pilot fields on both entities

srv/server.js: 'served' hook seeds missing codelist rows insert-if-missing (idempotent, audited, non-fatal); MASS_EDIT_RESTRICTION_COLUMNS/FIELD_TYPES extended with the previously-missing issuingAuthority/legalReference/approvalReference/enforcementAuthority/temporaryFrom-To-Reason/descr plus all new attributes; RestrictionSeverities + LaneAvailabilityTypes added to mass-edit dropdown datasets and lookup option map; posting status recomputed for affected bridges after a restriction mass edit

srv/handlers/upload.js + srv/services/upload.cds: massUploadRestrictions now maps the FULL entity (previously dropped approvedBy/approvalReference/enforcementAuthority/temporary fields/name/descr silently), auto-generates RST-NNNN refs, validates all coded fields against the codelist tables with row-level errors, writes ChangeLog per row inside the tx (bulk audit miss rolls back) and recomputes bridge posting status; new massDownloadRestrictions action for round-trip extract

srv/mass-upload.js (xlsx importer): 20 new restriction columns flagged optional so pre-existing templates keep importing (absent optional headers never null data); row-level codelist validation; posting-status refresh after import; FALLBACK_LOOKUP_DATA now sourced from the canonical catalogue; LaneAvailabilityTypes + RestrictionSeverities reference sheets added to the generated workbook (reference-only — those tables are CSV-seeded and would be truncated on deploy if made importable)
app/mass-edit/webapp/controller/MassEdit.controller.js + i18n: 26 new editable restriction columns with lookup-backed select editors and labels

srv/services/restrictions.cds + srv/lib/csv-export.js: ActiveRestrictions view gains category/vehicle-class/severity/lane/gazette-expiry/review-due; RESTRICTION_EXPORT_FIELDS gains the missing legal/authority/temporary/remarks columns + all new attributes (legacy column order locked by test)

scripts/generate-mass-upload-workbook.js + db/data/BMS-MassUpload-Complete.xlsx: generator no longer depends on removed source CSVs (lookup fallback to the canonical catalogue, Bridges sheet carried over), Restrictions sheet extended to 55 columns with 5 worked examples of the new types (Full Closure w/ gazette+detour, GCM, Lane, Axle Group, Environmental flood-trigger); workbook regenerated with 16 lookup sheets
testsAdded: test/restriction-codelists.test.js (24 tests): NSW/NHVR type-set completeness incl. closures, legacy 4 codes preserved verbatim (additive rule), unit-list internal consistency, axle-group/lanes/class/n-a units, One-way direction + 'Both Directions' default, Road Train/HML/PBS L1-L4 vehicle classes, 'Inactive' status, typeUnitMap coverage with legacy rules intact, isClosureType + derivePostingStatus (UNRESTRICTED/CLOSED/RESTRICTED incl. legacy 'CLOSURE'), applyTypedValue per-type mapping (incl. Lane-by-unit) without overriding explicit limits, missingCodes insert-if-missing idempotency with admin custom codes untouched, validateRestrictionCodes blocking-vs-soft semantics, CSV-export inclusion of all new fields with legacy column order locked

test/restrictions-fix.test.js (8 integration tests, in-memory CAP boot): LIST PARITY — BridgeValueHelp returns Active+Inactive bridges == register(default Active) ∪ register(status=Inactive filter); bridgeRef value list wired to BridgeValueHelp projecting bridge.management.Bridges; fresh-deploy runtime seeding of all six codelists with idempotent re-run; NEW-TYPE UPLOAD — massUploadRestrictions imports a Full Closure with gazette/severity/detour/signage, auto RST-NNNN ref, ChangeLog rows (source MassUpload) and bridge postingStatus=CLOSED; unknown-type row-level rejection; REPORT INCLUSION — ActiveRestrictions, NetworkRestrictionReport (new GCM/gazette/review columns) and dashboard getNetworkKPIs closedBridges all reflect the new data
